query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding activity in the June–July 2026 window:

**OpenAI** — No *new* equity round in June–July 2026. Its last round ($122B at $852B post-money) closed March 31, 2026. The relevant June–July activity was capital disbursement and IPO prep: SoftBank completed a **second $10B tranche on July 1, 2026** (third $10B scheduled Oct 1), and OpenAI confidentially filed a draft S-1 (reported June 8) targeting a possible Q4 2026 IPO.

**Anthropic** — No new round in June–July 2026. Its **$65B Series H at a $965B post-money valuation** was announced May 28, 2026, making it the world's most valuable startup (surpassing OpenAI), and was framed as possibly its last private raise before an IPO. July coverage concerns the round's ripple effects, not new fundraising.

**Mistral AI** — The **only company with a newly-reported active round** in the window. On **June 12, 2026**, Bloomberg reported Mistral in early talks to raise **~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B (~$23.15B) valuation** — nearly double its €11.7B Series C. It remains unconfirmed/early-stage with no disclosed closing timeline as of this research.

Note: AskNews was unavailable (credit limit), so I relied on web search plus direct fetches of primary/secondary sources. Bloomberg originals are paywalled but corroborated via TechCrunch, CNBC, SiliconANGLE, and the companies' own announcements. Full structured findings (key facts, 17 sources, 14 data points) have been submitted.

sources.title: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI
sources.snippet: Closed latest funding round with $122 billion in committed capital at a post-money valuation of $852 billion.

sources.title: OpenAI closes record-breaking $122 billion funding round as anticipation builds for IPO
sources.snippet: OpenAI closed a record-breaking funding round at a post-money valuation of $852 billion; totaled $122B up from $110B.

sources.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
sources.snippet: SoftBank co-led the round alongside a16z, D.E. Shaw Ventures, MGX, TPG, and T. Rowe Price; ~$3B from retail.

sources.title: SoftBank Group Completes Additional $10 Billion Investment in OpenAI; Plans Same Amount for October
sources.snippet: SoftBank on July 1 completed a $10B tranche; three equal $10B installments April 1, June 1, October 1, 2026.

sources.title: OpenAI IPO: $850B Valuation, $25B Revenue [2026]
sources.snippet: On June 8, 2026, OpenAI confidentially submitted a draft S-1 registration statement to the SEC.

sources.title: OpenAI Stock IPO: Valuation, Timeline and Investment Options
sources.snippet: OpenAI confidentially filed an S-1 on May 22, 2026; Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley leading; targeting Q4 2026.

sources.title: Eight banks back SoftBank's $40B OpenAI bridge loan ahead of expected IPO
sources.snippet: Eight banks agreed to act as sub-underwriters for SoftBank's $40B bridge loan for its OpenAI stake.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
sources.snippet: Raised $65B in Series H led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia, valuing Anthropic at $965B post-money.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
sources.snippet: $65B at $965B post-money; potentially last private fundraising before public markets; investors listed.

sources.title: Anthropic's Valuation Nears $1 Trillion After Raising $65 Billion
sources.snippet: Anthropic raised at a $965B valuation, eclipsing OpenAI.

sources.snippet: Mistral in talks to raise about €3B at a ~€20B valuation.

sources.snippet: Mistral in early discussions to raise ~€3B ($3.5B) at ~€20B ($23.15B), nearly double €11.7B Series C valuation.

sources.title: Mistral reportedly seeking $3.5B funding round amid physics AI push
sources.snippet: Mistral in talks to raise €3B (~$3.5B) from investors.

sources.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
sources.snippet: Mistral raised $830M in debt to build a Paris-area data center powered by Nvidia chips.

sources.title: Mistral AI - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn
sources.snippet: Mistral AI has raised ~$3.05B over 8 rounds; largest was a $2B Series C in Sep 2025.
